chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P.No.S-199 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.10.2025 Mr. Nadeem Abbasi, advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi AAG. Mr. Neel Parkash DPG. Mr. Ayaz Ali Laghari, advocate for respondent No.7 = Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks the following reliefs: a) That this Honourable court issue direction to official respondents not to harass the petitioners on the behest of private respondents and treat them like respectable citizens as guaranteed in the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. b) That this Honourable court issue direction to private respondents not to harass the petitioners and treat them like respectable citizens as guaranteed in the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. c) That this Honourable Court also issue directions to the official respondents to provide legal protection and safety to the petitioners. d) That this Honourable Court direct the official respondents that not register any criminal case against the Petitioners till prior permission of this Honourable Court. e) Any other appropriate relief which this Honourable court may deems fit and proper may be awarded to the petitioner. Pursuant to notices, Mr. Ayaz Ali Laghari, advocate puts his appearance along with private respondents and files Vakalatnama and undertakes on their behalf that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and ensured that neither they have caused any harassment to the petitioner nor they intended to-do-so in future. Learned A.A.G and D.P.G also undertake that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal

Ayaz Ali Laghari, advocate puts his appearance along with private respondents and files Vakalatnama and undertakes on their behalf that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and ensured that neither they have caused any harassment to the petitioner nor they intended to-do-so in future. Learned A.A.G and D.P.G also undertake that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when they approached to them. Learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied on the undertaking of learned A.A.G and D.P.G seeks disposal of instant petition. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
